task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'source /home/ga/.bashrc' or '. /home/ga/.bashrc' to configure the environment.

task_completion.description: Configure the global recordstream in global.cfg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a text editor (like nano or vim) or a command (like echo or sed) adding or modifying the line to 'recordstream = sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive' inside '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/global.cfg'.

task_completion.description: Generate an inventory listing of station codes from the GE network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command (e.g., grep, awk, python, or a SeisComP utility) reading '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/inventory/ge_stations.xml' and redirecting the extracted station codes to '/home/ga/inventory_listing.txt'.

task_completion.description: Extract miniSEED waveform data for January 1, 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command (e.g., using 'scart' or another SeisComP tool) querying the SDS archive for the date '2024-01-01' (or similar date format for Jan 1, 2024) and outputting to '/home/ga/extracted_waveforms.mseed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the generated output files exist and have content
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing commands like 'ls -l', 'cat', or 'head' confirming that '/home/ga/inventory_listing.txt' and '/home/ga/extracted_waveforms.mseed' were created and are not empty.

integrity.description: Agent parsed the XML file rather than hardcoding the station names
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not simply use 'echo' to write the specific station codes (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB) directly into the text file without reading the source XML.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely extracted waveform data rather than creating a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent used a proper extraction tool or script to generate the .mseed file, rather than using 'touch', 'echo', or copying an unrelated file to bypass the requirement.

integrity.description: Agent actually modified the global.cfg file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the configuration string was written to the actual file '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/global.cfg' and not just printed to the terminal or written to a temporary file that wasn't moved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target global.cfg path: /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/global.cfg. Required recordstream value: sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive. Expected stations in inventory: TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB. Minimum inventory file size: 10 bytes. Minimum extracted miniSEED file size: 512 bytes.
